headline: Meta Declares War on the Cloud Giants, and Chip Stocks Pay the Price
summary: Meta's surprise move into cloud computing sent its shares up nearly 9% and rattled the neocloud upstarts, while chip stocks broadly retreated as Wall Street rotated into software. Michael Burry doubled down on his AI short, central bankers debated AI's uncertain economic impact at the ECB's Sintra forum, and oil eased further as US-Iran talks continued in Qatar.

headline: Cantor Fitzgerald Raises Price Target on ON Semiconductor Corporation (ON)
summary: ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) is among the Most Promising Stocks. On June 29, Cantor Fitzgerald raised its price target on ON Semiconductor Corporation (NASDAQ:ON) to $110 from $100. The firm maintained a “Neutral” rating on the shares. Analyst Matthew Prisco said the AI infrastructure buildout represents a “generational semiconductor cycle” that remains durable. The analyst projected […]
